commands.name: bootstrap
commands.description: Bootstraps the build hooks so it can start automatically tracking where the source for your packages are

commands.name: ref
commands.description: Adds project references for a repo's packages into a solution

options.name: --solution
options.description: The path to the solution file. Auto-detected if not specified.

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: The name of a registered repo, a package ID, or a path to a .csproj

commands.name: register
commands.description: Registers a repo at the current or specified path

options.name: --path
options.description: The optional path to the repo

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: The name of the repo being registered

commands.name: unregister
commands.description: Unregisters a repo with the given name

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: The name of the repo being unregistered

commands.name: unref
commands.description: Removes project references that were added by xrepo ref

options.name: --solution
options.description: The path to the solution file. Auto-detected if not specified.

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: The name of a registered repo or package ID to unref (omit to unref all)

commands.name: where
commands.description: Lists all locations of a registered package

commands.name: which
commands.description: Outputs the most recently registered location for a package
